caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up in a bun is seated in a podcast studio, wearing black over-ear headphones and a black t-shirt. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind her is a white wall with a yellow vertical stripe and a black panel. To her left, a screen displays the name "Johnson" in red text. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking, with her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as she talks. On-screen graphics appear at the bottom, including a logo that reads "STUDIO PODCAST" and text that says "BOSS TALK 101" accompanied by a small logo and the text "by 11 Logo Studio." She remains in the same position throughout the clip, focusing her gaze slightly to the left of the camera.
